scripts.text:
--DIM_SERVICE_CATEGORY

UPDATE TGT
SET TGT.UNI_ServiceCategory = REF.UnifiedValue
FROM [EDW].[DIM_SERVICE_CATEGORY] TGT
JOIN [EDW_DUN].[UNI_REF_MAPPING] REF
ON TGT.ServiceCategoryID = REF.TablePK_EDW
JOIN [EDW_DUN].[UNI_TABLE_METADATA] MT
ON REF.UNI_MetaID = MT.UNI_MetaID
WHERE MT.TableName='DIM_SERVICE_CATEGORY' 
AND MT.SourceSystem='LP'
AND MT.TableColumnName='ServiceCategory'
AND REF.MappingInd!='UNMAPPED';

--DIM_JOB_STATUS

UPDATE TGT
SET 
TGT.UNI_JobStatus		= REF.UnifiedValue,
TGT.UNI_JobStatusCategory = REF.UnifiedValue_Group,
TGT.UNI_JobStatusSubCategory = REF.UnifiedValue_Category
FROM EDW.DIM_JOB_STATUS TGT
JOIN [EDW_DUN].[UNI_REF_MAPPING] REF
ON TGT.JobStatusID = REF.TablePK_EDW
JOIN [EDW_DUN].[UNI_TABLE_METADATA] MT
ON REF.UNI_MetaID = MT.UNI_MetaID
WHERE MT.TableName='DIM_JOB_STATUS' 
AND MT.SourceSystem='LP'
AND MT.TableColumnName='JobStatus'
AND REF.MappingInd!='UNMAPPED';


-- UNI_JobStatusCategory Override

UPDATE EDW.DIM_JOB_STATUS SET UNI_JobStatusCategory='Backlog' 			WHERE LP_JobStatusCategoryID=1;
UPDATE EDW.DIM_JOB_STATUS SET UNI_JobStatusCategory='On Hold' 			WHERE LP_JobStatusCategoryID=2;
UPDATE EDW.DIM_JOB_STATUS SET UNI_JobStatusCategory='Cancelled' 		WHERE LP_JobStatusCategoryID=3;
UPDATE EDW.DIM_JOB_STATUS SET UNI_JobStatusCategory='Completed' 		WHERE LP_JobStatusCategoryID=4;
UPDATE EDW.DIM_JOB_STATUS SET UNI_JobStatusCategory='Bank Turn Down' 	WHERE LP_JobStatusCategoryID=5;
UPDATE EDW.DIM_JOB_STATUS SET UNI_JobStatusCategory='Prenet' 			WHERE LP_JobStatusCategoryID=6;



-- RTW Override



UPDATE EDW.DIM_JOB_STATUS SET UNI_JobStatusSubCategory ='NOT BACKLOG'
WHERE Division='RTW'
AND JobStatus IN ('Cancel Pending'	,
'CustHold'	,
'CustHold/Future Inst'	,
'CustHold/MassSave'	,
'HoldProbMgt'	,
'Instald&Unpd Fin Exp'	,
'Instld & Pd Srvc Rqd'	,
'Instld & Unpd/CC Dec'	,
'Instld unpd/balance'	,
'Instld&Unpaid/Collec'	,
'Instld&Unpd w/Rep'	,
'Instld&Unpd/Inv Sent'	,
'Instld&unpd/wait chk'	,
'Measure under review'	,
'Mismeasure/On Floor'	,
'Mismeasure/Ordered'	,
'Mismeasure/Scheduled'	,
'OnFloor&CustHold'	,
'Out To Measure'	,
'Rt''d to Rep/Prod ?'	,
'Service/ Parts on FL'	,
'Service/Parts Ord''rd'	,
'Service/Scheduled'	,
'WriteOff/Wrnty Void '	
);


UPDATE EDW.DIM_JOB_STATUS SET UNI_JobStatusSubCategory ='PENDING CLOSE'
WHERE Division='RTW'
AND JobStatus IN ('Closed','Installed & Paid');


UPDATE EDW.DIM_JOB_STATUS SET UNI_JobStatusSubCategory ='PENDING CONTRACT REVIEW'
WHERE Division='RTW'
AND JobStatus IN ('Contract Review','Cust Ppwk Pending');


UPDATE EDW.DIM_JOB_STATUS SET UNI_JobStatusSubCategory ='PENDING INSTALL'
WHERE Division='RTW'
AND JobStatus IN ('Install Issues');


UPDATE EDW.DIM_JOB_STATUS SET UNI_JobStatusSubCategory ='PENDING TECHNICAL REVIEW'
WHERE Division='RTW'
AND JobStatus IN ('C/O Pending');

--DIM_FINANCE_COMPANY


UPDATE TGT
SET 
TGT.UNI_FinanceCompany		= REF.UnifiedValue
FROM EDW.DIM_FINANCE_COMPANY TGT
JOIN [EDW_DUN].[UNI_REF_MAPPING] REF
ON TGT.FinanceCompanyID = REF.TablePK_EDW
JOIN [EDW_DUN].[UNI_TABLE_METADATA] MT
ON REF.UNI_MetaID = MT.UNI_MetaID
WHERE MT.TableName='DIM_FINANCE_COMPANY' 
AND MT.SourceSystem='LP'
AND MT.TableColumnName='FinanceCompany'
AND REF.MappingInd!='UNMAPPED';

--DIM_LEAD_SOURCE_GROUP

UPDATE TGT
SET 
TGT.UNI_SourceGroup  = REF.UnifiedValue
FROM EDW.DIM_LEAD_SOURCE_GROUP TGT
JOIN [EDW_DUN].[UNI_REF_MAPPING] REF
ON TGT.LeadSourceGroupID = REF.TablePK_EDW
JOIN [EDW_DUN].[UNI_TABLE_METADATA] MT
ON REF.UNI_MetaID = MT.UNI_MetaID
WHERE MT.TableName='DIM_LEAD_SOURCE_GROUP' 
AND MT.SourceSystem='LP'
AND MT.TableColumnName='SourceGroup'
AND REF.MappingInd!='UNMAPPED';


UPDATE EDW.DIM_LEAD_SOURCE_GROUP
SET UNI_SourceGroup='NA'
WHERE SourceGroup IS NULL AND UNI_SourceGroup IS NULL;

--DIM_LEAD_SOURCE

UPDATE TGT
SET 
TGT.UNI_SourceCode  = REF.UnifiedValue,
TGT.UNI_SourceGroup = REF.UnifiedValue_Group
FROM EDW.DIM_LEAD_SOURCE TGT
JOIN [EDW_DUN].[UNI_REF_MAPPING] REF
ON TGT.LeadSourceID = REF.TablePK_EDW
JOIN [EDW_DUN].[UNI_TABLE_METADATA] MT
ON REF.UNI_MetaID = MT.UNI_MetaID
WHERE MT.TableName='DIM_LEAD_SOURCE' 
AND MT.SourceSystem='LP'
AND MT.TableColumnName='SourceCode'
AND REF.MappingInd!='UNMAPPED';

--DIM_PAYMENT_METHOD


UPDATE TGT
SET TGT.UNI_PaymentMethod = REF.UnifiedValue,
TGT.UNI_IsFinancing = SUBSTRING(REF.UnifiedValue_Group,CHARINDEX(' ',REF.UnifiedValue_Group)+1,3)
FROM EDW.DIM_PAYMENT_METHOD TGT
JOIN [EDW_DUN].[UNI_REF_MAPPING] REF
ON TGT.PaymentMethodID = REF.TablePK_EDW
JOIN [EDW_DUN].[UNI_TABLE_METADATA] MT
ON REF.UNI_MetaID = MT.UNI_MetaID
WHERE MT.TableName='DIM_PAYMENT_METHOD' 
AND MT.SourceSystem='LP'
AND MT.TableColumnName='PaymentMethod'
AND REF.MappingInd!='UNMAPPED';

--DIM_DISPOSITION


UPDATE TGT
SET 
TGT.UNI_Disposition 		= REF.UnifiedValue,
TGT.UNI_DispositionComments = REF.UnifiedValueDesc
FROM EDW.DIM_DISPOSITION TGT
JOIN [EDW_DUN].[UNI_REF_MAPPING] REF
ON TGT.DispositionID = REF.TablePK_EDW
JOIN [EDW_DUN].[UNI_TABLE_METADATA] MT
ON REF.UNI_MetaID = MT.UNI_MetaID
WHERE MT.TableName='DIM_DISPOSITION' 
AND MT.SourceSystem='LP'
AND MT.TableColumnName='Disposition'
AND REF.MappingInd!='UNMAPPED';



-- Temp Addition

UPDATE EDW.DIM_DISPOSITION SET UNI_Disposition='BT',UNI_DispositionComments='Bad Time' WHERE Comments LIKE '%iOS prompt - No Answer%'     AND UNI_Disposition IS NULL;
UPDATE EDW.DIM_DISPOSITION SET UNI_Disposition='CTD',UNI_DispositionComments='Contacted' WHERE Comments LIKE '%iOS prompt - Contacted%'     AND UNI_Disposition IS NULL;
UPDATE EDW.DIM_DISPOSITION SET UNI_Disposition='Set',UNI_DispositionComments='Appointment Date Set' WHERE Comments LIKE '%iOS prompt - Appt Set%'      AND UNI_Disposition IS NULL;
UPDATE EDW.DIM_DISPOSITION SET UNI_Disposition='DNC',UNI_DispositionComments='Do Not Call' WHERE Comments LIKE '%iOS prompt - DNC requested%' AND UNI_Disposition IS NULL;

--DIM_CALL_RESULT


UPDATE TGT
SET 
TGT.UNI_CallResult		= REF.UnifiedValue
FROM EDW.DIM_CALL_RESULT TGT
JOIN [EDW_DUN].[UNI_REF_MAPPING] REF
ON TGT.CallResultID = REF.TablePK_EDW
JOIN [EDW_DUN].[UNI_TABLE_METADATA] MT
ON REF.UNI_MetaID = MT.UNI_MetaID
WHERE MT.TableName='DIM_CALL_RESULT' 
AND MT.SourceSystem='LP'
AND MT.TableColumnName='CallResult'
AND REF.MappingInd!='UNMAPPED';

--DIM_MILESTONE_DATE_TYPE


UPDATE TGT
SET 
TGT.UNI_MilestoneDateType		= REF.UnifiedValue,
TGT.UNI_MilestoneDateType_Group = REF.UnifiedValue_Group
FROM EDW.DIM_MILESTONE_DATE_TYPE TGT
JOIN [EDW_DUN].[UNI_REF_MAPPING] REF
ON TGT.MilestoneDateTypeID = REF.TablePK_EDW
JOIN [EDW_DUN].[UNI_TABLE_METADATA] MT
ON REF.UNI_MetaID = MT.UNI_MetaID
WHERE MT.TableName='DIM_MILESTONE_DATE_TYPE' 
AND MT.SourceSystem='LP'
AND MT.TableColumnName='MilestoneDateType'
AND REF.MappingInd!='UNMAPPED';

--DIM_SERVICE_STATUS


UPDATE TGT
SET 
TGT.UNI_ServiceStatus		= REF.UnifiedValue
FROM EDW.DIM_SERVICE_STATUS TGT
JOIN [EDW_DUN].[UNI_REF_MAPPING] REF
ON TGT.ServiceStatusID = REF.TablePK_EDW
JOIN [EDW_DUN].[UNI_TABLE_METADATA] MT
ON REF.UNI_MetaID = MT.UNI_MetaID
WHERE MT.TableName='DIM_SERVICE_STATUS' 
AND MT.SourceSystem='LP'
AND MT.TableColumnName='ServiceStatus'
AND REF.MappingInd!='UNMAPPED';

--DIM_FINANCE_SOURCE


UPDATE TGT
SET 
TGT.UNI_FinanceSource		= REF.UnifiedValue
FROM EDW.DIM_FINANCE_SOURCE TGT
JOIN [EDW_DUN].[UNI_REF_MAPPING] REF
ON TGT.FinanceSourceID = REF.TablePK_EDW
JOIN [EDW_DUN].[UNI_TABLE_METADATA] MT
ON REF.UNI_MetaID = MT.UNI_MetaID
WHERE MT.TableName='DIM_FINANCE_SOURCE' 
AND MT.SourceSystem='LP'
AND MT.TableColumnName='FinanceSource'
AND REF.MappingInd!='UNMAPPED';

--DIM_PRODUCT_GROUP


UPDATE TGT
SET 
TGT.UNI_ProductGroup 		= REF.UnifiedValue
FROM EDW.DIM_PRODUCT_GROUP TGT
JOIN [EDW_DUN].[UNI_REF_MAPPING] REF
ON TGT.ProductGroupID = REF.TablePK_EDW
JOIN [EDW_DUN].[UNI_TABLE_METADATA] MT
ON REF.UNI_MetaID = MT.UNI_MetaID
WHERE MT.TableName='DIM_PRODUCT_GROUP' 
AND MT.SourceSystem='LP'
AND MT.TableColumnName='ProductGroup'
AND REF.MappingInd!='UNMAPPED';

--DIM_JOB_COST_CATEGORY


UPDATE TGT
SET 
TGT.UNI_JobCostCategory		= REF.UnifiedValue
FROM EDW.DIM_JOB_COST_CATEGORY TGT
JOIN [EDW_DUN].[UNI_REF_MAPPING] REF
ON TGT.JobCostCategoryID = REF.TablePK_EDW
JOIN [EDW_DUN].[UNI_TABLE_METADATA] MT
ON REF.UNI_MetaID = MT.UNI_MetaID
WHERE MT.TableName='DIM_JOB_COST_CATEGORY' 
AND MT.SourceSystem='LP'
AND MT.TableColumnName='JobCostCategory'
AND REF.MappingInd!='UNMAPPED';

--DIM_PAYMENT_TYPE


UPDATE TGT
SET 
TGT.UNI_PaymentType		= REF.UnifiedValue
FROM EDW.DIM_PAYMENT_TYPE TGT
JOIN [EDW_DUN].[UNI_REF_MAPPING] REF
ON TGT.PaymentTypeID = REF.TablePK_EDW
JOIN [EDW_DUN].[UNI_TABLE_METADATA] MT
ON REF.UNI_MetaID = MT.UNI_MetaID
WHERE MT.TableName='DIM_PAYMENT_TYPE' 
AND MT.SourceSystem='LP'
AND MT.TableColumnName='PaymentType'
AND REF.MappingInd!='UNMAPPED';

--DIM_CALL_TYPE


UPDATE TGT
SET 
TGT.UNI_CallType		= REF.UnifiedValue
FROM EDW.DIM_CALL_TYPE TGT
JOIN [EDW_DUN].[UNI_REF_MAPPING] REF
ON TGT.CallTypeID = REF.TablePK_EDW
JOIN [EDW_DUN].[UNI_TABLE_METADATA] MT
ON REF.UNI_MetaID = MT.UNI_MetaID
WHERE MT.TableName='DIM_CALL_TYPE' 
AND MT.SourceSystem='LP'
AND MT.TableColumnName='CallType'
AND REF.MappingInd!='UNMAPPED';

--DIM_PRODUCT

UPDATE A
SET 
A.UNI_ProductName = B.TX_Product_Reporting ,
A.UNI_ProductGroup = B.TX_ProductGroup 
FROM EDW.DIM_PRODUCT A 
JOIN [EDW].[DIM_MKTNG_PRODUCT_MAPPING] B 
ON A.ProductID = B.ProductID


UPDATE TGT
SET 
TGT.UNI_ProductName  = REF.UnifiedValue,
TGT.UNI_ProductGroup = REF.UnifiedValue_Group
FROM EDW.DIM_PRODUCT TGT
JOIN [EDW_DUN].[UNI_REF_MAPPING] REF
ON TGT.ProductID = REF.TablePK_EDW
JOIN [EDW_DUN].[UNI_TABLE_METADATA] MT
ON REF.UNI_MetaID = MT.UNI_MetaID
WHERE MT.TableName='DIM_PRODUCT' 
AND MT.SourceSystem='LP'
AND MT.TableColumnName='ProductName'
AND REF.MappingInd!='UNMAPPED'
AND TGT.UNI_ProductName IS NULL;

--DIM_BRANCH

UPDATE A
SET A.UNI_Market = B.UNI_Market,
A.UNI_MarketGroup = B.UNI_MarketGroup
FROM [EDW].[DIM_BRANCH] A 
JOIN EDW_DUN.DIM_BRANCH_EXTN B
ON A.BranchID =B.BranchID;


UPDATE TGT
SET 
TGT.UNI_Market  = REF.UnifiedValue,
TGT.UNI_MarketGroup = REF.UnifiedValue_Group
FROM EDW.DIM_BRANCH TGT
JOIN [EDW_DUN].[UNI_REF_MAPPING] REF
ON TGT.BranchID = REF.TablePK_EDW
JOIN [EDW_DUN].[UNI_TABLE_METADATA] MT
ON REF.UNI_MetaID = MT.UNI_MetaID
WHERE MT.TableName='DIM_BRANCH' 
AND MT.SourceSystem='LP'
AND MT.TableColumnName='LongName'
AND REF.MappingInd!='UNMAPPED'
AND TGT.UNI_Market IS NULL;

UPDATE  A
SET 
A.UNI_Channel		= B.TX_Channel,
A.UNI_SourceGroup	= B.TX_SourceGroup,
A.UNI_SourceCode		= B.TX_SourceCode
FROM [EDW].[DIM_LEAD_SUB_SOURCE] A
JOIN (SELECT * FROM [EDW].[DIM_MKTNG_SUB_SOURCE_MAPPING] WHERE MappingInd!='UNMAP') B
ON A.LeadSubSourceID = B.LeadSubSourceID
